title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese examines how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses the platform's Skills feature to automate work. The video covers three main strategies: agents, hooks, and loops/scheduling, plus the platform's least-known powerful features.
